data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding due date and request lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the due date and request lifecycle (open/fulfilled/declined/expired). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm or deny the satisfaction of this requirement. The prior steps do not address the specific need for evidence related to the due date and request lifecycle, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of due date and request lifecycle being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the due date and request lifecycle.
